title: Brazen status — both peers in flight; no new commits
body: T+~8min. No new directed messages. No new commits. Lofty: 2 claims still active on graph-core (likely mid commit-queue protocol for WS1.3). Radiant: WS2.1 scaffold tree visible — packages/libs/graph-ingest/ created with README/package.json/eslint.config.ts/tsconfig.*/tsup.config.ts/vitest.config.ts/src; scaffold-checklist progressing. No new comms-tooling friction this tick. Waiting on WS1.3 SHA before forwarding GO to Radiant.
